What We Do

Our Roofing Services

From a single slipped tile to a complete new roof, we deliver durable roofing solutions using trusted materials and professional workmanship.

See The Difference

Before & After

Watch a recent transformation — the proof is in the finish.

Recent Project

Dry Ridge System Installation

This roof's ridge line had failed — the original cement mortar bedding had cracked, crumbled and worked loose, leaving the ridge tiles exposed to wind and water.

We stripped out the old mortar and installed a modern, mechanically-fixed dry ridge system. The result is a clean, secure and fully weather-tight ridge that won't work loose over time, with no future re-pointing required.

  • Old, cracked mortar bedding fully removed
  • New dry-fix ridge mechanically fixed in place
  • Weather-tight, virtually maintenance-free finish
  • In line with modern BS 5534 fixing standards

About Us

Welcome to New Look Roofing

We are committed to providing high-quality roofing services tailored to the needs of every client. Whether you need emergency roof repairs, a new roof installation, or routine maintenance, our team is here to help.

We understand the importance of a strong, reliable roof — that's why we focus on durable solutions using trusted materials and professional workmanship. Our goal is simple: to give every customer peace of mind knowing their property is protected.

  • Residential & commercial roofing
  • Free, no-obligation quotations
  • Covering Morecambe, Lancaster, Blackpool, Preston & surrounding areas
